summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AYI is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $280.22. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 37.5%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $300.73 and a significant trendline confluence around $297.76 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
